name: buyer-context
description: 12-skill audit collection that simulates how AI buying agents read your site and produces a gap report your repair agents can close.

interface.longDescription: Buyer Context is a 12-skill audit suite that runs your site through the same pass an AI buying agent does — extractability, schema, ICP alignment, citation-worthy proof, agent-actionability, crawler accessibility — and writes a prioritized gap report your repair agents can act on.
defaultPrompt: Run a full buyer-context audit on my site
Audit my homepage for AI buying agents
Check if AI bots can crawl my site
